{{Year nav|12022}}

'''12022''' is a year in the [[Gaian calendar]], corresponding roughly to Gregorian [[:en:AD 2022|2022 AD]][[en:AD 2022]].

12022 goes from 2022-01-03 to 2023-01-01.

This year contains 364 days across the 13 regular months.

12022 corresponds mostly to the Gregorian year [[:en:AD 2022|2022 AD]][[en:AD 2022]] but has some overlap with [[:en:AD 2023|2023 AD]][[en:AD 2023]].

== Overview ==
===Global themes===
The year 2022 was marked by significant global events across politics, culture, science, and society.
===Events===
* Russian invasion of Ukraine
* Queen Elizabeth II dies
* Beijing Winter Olympics
===old fandom article===
2022 is the current year. It came after [[2021]]. It was dominated by a lot of political events and the formalization of the discoveries of the [[2021 revelation]]. It was the first year [[Alolalia]] was celebrated.

It is an eventful year starting with the [[2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine]], followed by [[Kamidere]] starting [[transition]] and founding the [[Church of Evolution]], followed by the [[repeal of roe v wade]], followed by the [[2022 pilgrimage]], followed by the [[FBI raid on Donald Trump]].

[[Category:History]]

== 12022 Calendar ==
{| class="wikitable" style="table-layout:fixed; width:100%; font-size:90%;"
|+ [[12022 GE]]
|-
! style="width:12%;" | {{v|t|e|template=Gaian_calendar}}
! colspan="14" | [[Gaian calendar]]
|-
! style="width:12%;" | Days || style="width:6%;" | Mon || style="width:6%;" | Tue || style="width:6%;" | Wed || style="width:6%;" | Thu || style="width:6%;" | Fri || style="width:6%;" | Sat || style="width:6%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun || style="width:6%;" | Mon || style="width:6%;" | Tue || style="width:6%;" | Wed || style="width:6%;" | Thu || style="width:6%;" | Fri || style="width:6%;" | Sat || style="width:6%; background:#ffd700;" | Sun
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Sagittarius]] || | [[Sagittarius 1|1]] || | [[Sagittarius 2|2]] || | [[Sagittarius 3|3]] || | [[Sagittarius 4|4]] || | [[Sagittarius 5|5]] || | [[Sagittarius 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Sagittarius 7|7]] || | [[Sagittarius 8|8]] || | [[Sagittarius 9|9]] || | [[Sagittarius 10|10]] || | [[Sagittarius 11|11]] || | [[Sagittarius 12|12]] || | [[Sagittarius 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Sagittarius 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:January 3|Jan 3]] || | [[:en:January 4|Jan 4]] || | [[:en:January 5|Jan 5]] || | [[:en:January 6|Jan 6]] || | [[:en:January 7|Jan 7]] || | [[:en:January 8|Jan 8]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:January 9|Jan 9]] || | [[:en:January 10|Jan 10]] || | [[:en:January 11|Jan 11]] || | [[:en:January 12|Jan 12]] || | [[:en:January 13|Jan 13]] || | [[:en:January 14|Jan 14]] || | [[:en:January 15|Jan 15]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:January 16|Jan 16]]
|-
 || | [[Sagittarius 15|15]] || | [[Sagittarius 16|16]] || | [[Sagittarius 17|17]] || | [[Sagittarius 18|18]] || | [[Sagittarius 19|19]] || | [[Sagittarius 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Sagittarius 21|21]] || | [[Sagittarius 22|22]] || | [[Sagittarius 23|23]] || | [[Sagittarius 24|24]] || | [[Sagittarius 25|25]] || | [[Sagittarius 26|26]] || | [[Sagittarius 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Sagittarius 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:January 17|Jan 17]] || | [[:en:January 18|Jan 18]] || | [[:en:January 19|Jan 19]] || | [[:en:January 20|Jan 20]] || | [[:en:January 21|Jan 21]] || | [[:en:January 22|Jan 22]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:January 23|Jan 23]] || | [[:en:January 24|Jan 24]] || | [[:en:January 25|Jan 25]] || | [[:en:January 26|Jan 26]] || | [[:en:January 27|Jan 27]] || | [[:en:January 28|Jan 28]] || | [[:en:January 29|Jan 29]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:January 30|Jan 30]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Capricorn]] || | [[Capricorn 1|1]] || | [[Capricorn 2|2]] || | [[Capricorn 3|3]] || | [[Capricorn 4|4]] || | [[Capricorn 5|5]] || | [[Capricorn 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Capricorn 7|7]] || | [[Capricorn 8|8]] || | [[Capricorn 9|9]] || | [[Capricorn 10|10]] || | [[Capricorn 11|11]] || | [[Capricorn 12|12]] || | [[Capricorn 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Capricorn 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:January 31|Jan 31]] || | [[:en:February 1|Feb 1]] || | [[:en:February 2|Feb 2]] || | [[:en:February 3|Feb 3]] || | [[:en:February 4|Feb 4]] || | [[:en:February 5|Feb 5]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:February 6|Feb 6]] || | [[:en:February 7|Feb 7]] || | [[:en:February 8|Feb 8]] || | [[:en:February 9|Feb 9]] || | [[:en:February 10|Feb 10]] || | [[:en:February 11|Feb 11]] || | [[:en:February 12|Feb 12]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:February 13|Feb 13]]
|-
 || | [[Capricorn 15|15]] || | [[Capricorn 16|16]] || | [[Capricorn 17|17]] || | [[Capricorn 18|18]] || | [[Capricorn 19|19]] || | [[Capricorn 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Capricorn 21|21]] || | [[Capricorn 22|22]] || | [[Capricorn 23|23]] || | [[Capricorn 24|24]] || | [[Capricorn 25|25]] || | [[Capricorn 26|26]] || | [[Capricorn 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Capricorn 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:February 14|Feb 14]] || | [[:en:February 15|Feb 15]] || | [[:en:February 16|Feb 16]] || | [[:en:February 17|Feb 17]] || | [[:en:February 18|Feb 18]] || | [[:en:February 19|Feb 19]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:February 20|Feb 20]] || | [[:en:February 21|Feb 21]] || | [[:en:February 22|Feb 22]] || | [[:en:February 23|Feb 23]] || | [[:en:February 24|Feb 24]] || | [[:en:February 25|Feb 25]] || | [[:en:February 26|Feb 26]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:February 27|Feb 27]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Aquarius]] || | [[Aquarius 1|1]] || | [[Aquarius 2|2]] || | [[Aquarius 3|3]] || | [[Aquarius 4|4]] || | [[Aquarius 5|5]] || | [[Aquarius 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aquarius 7|7]] || | [[Aquarius 8|8]] || | [[Aquarius 9|9]] || | [[Aquarius 10|10]] || | [[Aquarius 11|11]] || | [[Aquarius 12|12]] || | [[Aquarius 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aquarius 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:February 28|Feb 28]] || | [[:en:March 1|Mar 1]] || | [[:en:March 2|Mar 2]] || | [[:en:March 3|Mar 3]] || | [[:en:March 4|Mar 4]] || | [[:en:March 5|Mar 5]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:March 6|Mar 6]] || | [[:en:March 7|Mar 7]] || | [[:en:March 8|Mar 8]] || | [[:en:March 9|Mar 9]] || | [[:en:March 10|Mar 10]] || | [[:en:March 11|Mar 11]] || | [[:en:March 12|Mar 12]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:March 13|Mar 13]]
|-
 || | [[Aquarius 15|15]] || | [[Aquarius 16|16]] || | [[Aquarius 17|17]] || | [[Aquarius 18|18]] || | [[Aquarius 19|19]] || | [[Aquarius 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aquarius 21|21]] || | [[Aquarius 22|22]] || | [[Aquarius 23|23]] || | [[Aquarius 24|24]] || | [[Aquarius 25|25]] || | [[Aquarius 26|26]] || | [[Aquarius 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aquarius 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:March 14|Mar 14]] || | [[:en:March 15|Mar 15]] || | [[:en:March 16|Mar 16]] || | [[:en:March 17|Mar 17]] || | [[:en:March 18|Mar 18]] || | [[:en:March 19|Mar 19]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:March 20|Mar 20]] || | [[:en:March 21|Mar 21]] || | [[:en:March 22|Mar 22]] || | [[:en:March 23|Mar 23]] || | [[:en:March 24|Mar 24]] || | [[:en:March 25|Mar 25]] || | [[:en:March 26|Mar 26]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:March 27|Mar 27]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Pisces]] || | [[Pisces 1|1]] || | [[Pisces 2|2]] || | [[Pisces 3|3]] || | [[Pisces 4|4]] || | [[Pisces 5|5]] || | [[Pisces 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Pisces 7|7]] || | [[Pisces 8|8]] || | [[Pisces 9|9]] || | [[Pisces 10|10]] || | [[Pisces 11|11]] || | [[Pisces 12|12]] || | [[Pisces 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Pisces 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:March 28|Mar 28]] || | [[:en:March 29|Mar 29]] || | [[:en:March 30|Mar 30]] || | [[:en:March 31|Mar 31]] || | [[:en:April 1|Apr 1]] || | [[:en:April 2|Apr 2]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:April 3|Apr 3]] || | [[:en:April 4|Apr 4]] || | [[:en:April 5|Apr 5]] || | [[:en:April 6|Apr 6]] || | [[:en:April 7|Apr 7]] || | [[:en:April 8|Apr 8]] || | [[:en:April 9|Apr 9]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:April 10|Apr 10]]
|-
 || | [[Pisces 15|15]] || | [[Pisces 16|16]] || | [[Pisces 17|17]] || | [[Pisces 18|18]] || | [[Pisces 19|19]] || | [[Pisces 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Pisces 21|21]] || | [[Pisces 22|22]] || | [[Pisces 23|23]] || | [[Pisces 24|24]] || | [[Pisces 25|25]] || | [[Pisces 26|26]] || | [[Pisces 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Pisces 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:April 11|Apr 11]] || | [[:en:April 12|Apr 12]] || | [[:en:April 13|Apr 13]] || | [[:en:April 14|Apr 14]] || | [[:en:April 15|Apr 15]] || | [[:en:April 16|Apr 16]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:April 17|Apr 17]] || | [[:en:April 18|Apr 18]] || | [[:en:April 19|Apr 19]] || | [[:en:April 20|Apr 20]] || | [[:en:April 21|Apr 21]] || | [[:en:April 22|Apr 22]] || | [[:en:April 23|Apr 23]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:April 24|Apr 24]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Aries]] || | [[Aries 1|1]] || | [[Aries 2|2]] || | [[Aries 3|3]] || | [[Aries 4|4]] || | [[Aries 5|5]] || | [[Aries 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aries 7|7]] || | [[Aries 8|8]] || | [[Aries 9|9]] || | [[Aries 10|10]] || | [[Aries 11|11]] || | [[Aries 12|12]] || | [[Aries 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aries 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:April 25|Apr 25]] || | [[:en:April 26|Apr 26]] || | [[:en:April 27|Apr 27]] || | [[:en:April 28|Apr 28]] || | [[:en:April 29|Apr 29]] || | [[:en:April 30|Apr 30]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:May 1|May 1]] || | [[:en:May 2|May 2]] || | [[:en:May 3|May 3]] || | [[:en:May 4|May 4]] || | [[:en:May 5|May 5]] || | [[:en:May 6|May 6]] || | [[:en:May 7|May 7]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:May 8|May 8]]
|-
 || | [[Aries 15|15]] || | [[Aries 16|16]] || | [[Aries 17|17]] || | [[Aries 18|18]] || | [[Aries 19|19]] || | [[Aries 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aries 21|21]] || | [[Aries 22|22]] || | [[Aries 23|23]] || | [[Aries 24|24]] || | [[Aries 25|25]] || | [[Aries 26|26]] || | [[Aries 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Aries 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:May 9|May 9]] || | [[:en:May 10|May 10]] || | [[:en:May 11|May 11]] || | [[:en:May 12|May 12]] || | [[:en:May 13|May 13]] || | [[:en:May 14|May 14]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:May 15|May 15]] || | [[:en:May 16|May 16]] || | [[:en:May 17|May 17]] || | [[:en:May 18|May 18]] || | [[:en:May 19|May 19]] || | [[:en:May 20|May 20]] || | [[:en:May 21|May 21]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:May 22|May 22]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Taurus]] || | [[Taurus 1|1]] || | [[Taurus 2|2]] || | [[Taurus 3|3]] || | [[Taurus 4|4]] || | [[Taurus 5|5]] || | [[Taurus 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Taurus 7|7]] || | [[Taurus 8|8]] || | [[Taurus 9|9]] || | [[Taurus 10|10]] || | [[Taurus 11|11]] || | [[Taurus 12|12]] || | [[Taurus 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Taurus 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:May 23|May 23]] || | [[:en:May 24|May 24]] || | [[:en:May 25|May 25]] || | [[:en:May 26|May 26]] || | [[:en:May 27|May 27]] || | [[:en:May 28|May 28]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:May 29|May 29]] || | [[:en:May 30|May 30]] || | [[:en:May 31|May 31]] || | [[:en:June 1|Jun 1]] || | [[:en:June 2|Jun 2]] || | [[:en:June 3|Jun 3]] || | [[:en:June 4|Jun 4]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:June 5|Jun 5]]
|-
 || | [[Taurus 15|15]] || | [[Taurus 16|16]] || | [[Taurus 17|17]] || | [[Taurus 18|18]] || | [[Taurus 19|19]] || | [[Taurus 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Taurus 21|21]] || | [[Taurus 22|22]] || | [[Taurus 23|23]] || | [[Taurus 24|24]] || | [[Taurus 25|25]] || | [[Taurus 26|26]] || | [[Taurus 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Taurus 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:June 6|Jun 6]] || | [[:en:June 7|Jun 7]] || | [[:en:June 8|Jun 8]] || | [[:en:June 9|Jun 9]] || | [[:en:June 10|Jun 10]] || | [[:en:June 11|Jun 11]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:June 12|Jun 12]] || | [[:en:June 13|Jun 13]] || | [[:en:June 14|Jun 14]] || | [[:en:June 15|Jun 15]] || | [[:en:June 16|Jun 16]] || | [[:en:June 17|Jun 17]] || | [[:en:June 18|Jun 18]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:June 19|Jun 19]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Gemini]] || | [[Gemini 1|1]] || | [[Gemini 2|2]] || | [[Gemini 3|3]] || | [[Gemini 4|4]] || | [[Gemini 5|5]] || | [[Gemini 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Gemini 7|7]] || | [[Gemini 8|8]] || | [[Gemini 9|9]] || | [[Gemini 10|10]] || | [[Gemini 11|11]] || | [[Gemini 12|12]] || | [[Gemini 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Gemini 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:June 20|Jun 20]] || | [[:en:June 21|Jun 21]] || | [[:en:June 22|Jun 22]] || | [[:en:June 23|Jun 23]] || | [[:en:June 24|Jun 24]] || | [[:en:June 25|Jun 25]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:June 26|Jun 26]] || | [[:en:June 27|Jun 27]] || | [[:en:June 28|Jun 28]] || | [[:en:June 29|Jun 29]] || | [[:en:June 30|Jun 30]] || | [[:en:July 1|Jul 1]] || | [[:en:July 2|Jul 2]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:July 3|Jul 3]]
|-
 || | [[Gemini 15|15]] || | [[Gemini 16|16]] || | [[Gemini 17|17]] || | [[Gemini 18|18]] || | [[Gemini 19|19]] || | [[Gemini 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Gemini 21|21]] || | [[Gemini 22|22]] || | [[Gemini 23|23]] || | [[Gemini 24|24]] || | [[Gemini 25|25]] || | [[Gemini 26|26]] || | [[Gemini 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Gemini 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:July 4|Jul 4]] || | [[:en:July 5|Jul 5]] || | [[:en:July 6|Jul 6]] || | [[:en:July 7|Jul 7]] || | [[:en:July 8|Jul 8]] || | [[:en:July 9|Jul 9]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:July 10|Jul 10]] || | [[:en:July 11|Jul 11]] || | [[:en:July 12|Jul 12]] || | [[:en:July 13|Jul 13]] || | [[:en:July 14|Jul 14]] || | [[:en:July 15|Jul 15]] || | [[:en:July 16|Jul 16]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:July 17|Jul 17]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Cancer]] || | [[Cancer 1|1]] || | [[Cancer 2|2]] || | [[Cancer 3|3]] || | [[Cancer 4|4]] || | [[Cancer 5|5]] || | [[Cancer 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Cancer 7|7]] || | [[Cancer 8|8]] || | [[Cancer 9|9]] || | [[Cancer 10|10]] || | [[Cancer 11|11]] || | [[Cancer 12|12]] || | [[Cancer 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Cancer 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:July 18|Jul 18]] || | [[:en:July 19|Jul 19]] || | [[:en:July 20|Jul 20]] || | [[:en:July 21|Jul 21]] || | [[:en:July 22|Jul 22]] || | [[:en:July 23|Jul 23]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:July 24|Jul 24]] || | [[:en:July 25|Jul 25]] || | [[:en:July 26|Jul 26]] || | [[:en:July 27|Jul 27]] || | [[:en:July 28|Jul 28]] || | [[:en:July 29|Jul 29]] || | [[:en:July 30|Jul 30]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:July 31|Jul 31]]
|-
 || | [[Cancer 15|15]] || | [[Cancer 16|16]] || | [[Cancer 17|17]] || | [[Cancer 18|18]] || | [[Cancer 19|19]] || | [[Cancer 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Cancer 21|21]] || | [[Cancer 22|22]] || | [[Cancer 23|23]] || | [[Cancer 24|24]] || | [[Cancer 25|25]] || | [[Cancer 26|26]] || | [[Cancer 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Cancer 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:August 1|Aug 1]] || | [[:en:August 2|Aug 2]] || | [[:en:August 3|Aug 3]] || | [[:en:August 4|Aug 4]] || | [[:en:August 5|Aug 5]] || | [[:en:August 6|Aug 6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:August 7|Aug 7]] || | [[:en:August 8|Aug 8]] || | [[:en:August 9|Aug 9]] || | [[:en:August 10|Aug 10]] || | [[:en:August 11|Aug 11]] || | [[:en:August 12|Aug 12]] || | [[:en:August 13|Aug 13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:August 14|Aug 14]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Leo]] || | [[Leo 1|1]] || | [[Leo 2|2]] || | [[Leo 3|3]] || | [[Leo 4|4]] || | [[Leo 5|5]] || | [[Leo 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Leo 7|7]] || | [[Leo 8|8]] || | [[Leo 9|9]] || | [[Leo 10|10]] || | [[Leo 11|11]] || | [[Leo 12|12]] || | [[Leo 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Leo 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:August 15|Aug 15]] || | [[:en:August 16|Aug 16]] || | [[:en:August 17|Aug 17]] || | [[:en:August 18|Aug 18]] || | [[:en:August 19|Aug 19]] || | [[:en:August 20|Aug 20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:August 21|Aug 21]] || | [[:en:August 22|Aug 22]] || | [[:en:August 23|Aug 23]] || | [[:en:August 24|Aug 24]] || | [[:en:August 25|Aug 25]] || | [[:en:August 26|Aug 26]] || | [[:en:August 27|Aug 27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:August 28|Aug 28]]
|-
 || | [[Leo 15|15]] || | [[Leo 16|16]] || | [[Leo 17|17]] || | [[Leo 18|18]] || | [[Leo 19|19]] || | [[Leo 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Leo 21|21]] || | [[Leo 22|22]] || | [[Leo 23|23]] || | [[Leo 24|24]] || | [[Leo 25|25]] || | [[Leo 26|26]] || | [[Leo 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Leo 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:August 29|Aug 29]] || | [[:en:August 30|Aug 30]] || | [[:en:August 31|Aug 31]] || | [[:en:September 1|Sep 1]] || | [[:en:September 2|Sep 2]] || | [[:en:September 3|Sep 3]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:September 4|Sep 4]] || | [[:en:September 5|Sep 5]] || | [[:en:September 6|Sep 6]] || | [[:en:September 7|Sep 7]] || | [[:en:September 8|Sep 8]] || | [[:en:September 9|Sep 9]] || | [[:en:September 10|Sep 10]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:September 11|Sep 11]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Virgo]] || | [[Virgo 1|1]] || | [[Virgo 2|2]] || | [[Virgo 3|3]] || | [[Virgo 4|4]] || | [[Virgo 5|5]] || | [[Virgo 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Virgo 7|7]] || | [[Virgo 8|8]] || | [[Virgo 9|9]] || | [[Virgo 10|10]] || | [[Virgo 11|11]] || | [[Virgo 12|12]] || | [[Virgo 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Virgo 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:September 12|Sep 12]] || | [[:en:September 13|Sep 13]] || | [[:en:September 14|Sep 14]] || | [[:en:September 15|Sep 15]] || | [[:en:September 16|Sep 16]] || | [[:en:September 17|Sep 17]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:September 18|Sep 18]] || | [[:en:September 19|Sep 19]] || | [[:en:September 20|Sep 20]] || | [[:en:September 21|Sep 21]] || | [[:en:September 22|Sep 22]] || | [[:en:September 23|Sep 23]] || | [[:en:September 24|Sep 24]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:September 25|Sep 25]]
|-
 || | [[Virgo 15|15]] || | [[Virgo 16|16]] || | [[Virgo 17|17]] || | [[Virgo 18|18]] || | [[Virgo 19|19]] || | [[Virgo 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Virgo 21|21]] || | [[Virgo 22|22]] || | [[Virgo 23|23]] || | [[Virgo 24|24]] || | [[Virgo 25|25]] || | [[Virgo 26|26]] || | [[Virgo 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Virgo 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:September 26|Sep 26]] || | [[:en:September 27|Sep 27]] || | [[:en:September 28|Sep 28]] || | [[:en:September 29|Sep 29]] || | [[:en:September 30|Sep 30]] || | [[:en:October 1|Oct 1]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:October 2|Oct 2]] || | [[:en:October 3|Oct 3]] || | [[:en:October 4|Oct 4]] || | [[:en:October 5|Oct 5]] || | [[:en:October 6|Oct 6]] || | [[:en:October 7|Oct 7]] || | [[:en:October 8|Oct 8]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:October 9|Oct 9]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Libra]] || | [[Libra 1|1]] || | [[Libra 2|2]] || | [[Libra 3|3]] || | [[Libra 4|4]] || | [[Libra 5|5]] || | [[Libra 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Libra 7|7]] || | [[Libra 8|8]] || | [[Libra 9|9]] || | [[Libra 10|10]] || | [[Libra 11|11]] || | [[Libra 12|12]] || | [[Libra 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Libra 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:October 10|Oct 10]] || | [[:en:October 11|Oct 11]] || | [[:en:October 12|Oct 12]] || | [[:en:October 13|Oct 13]] || | [[:en:October 14|Oct 14]] || | [[:en:October 15|Oct 15]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:October 16|Oct 16]] || | [[:en:October 17|Oct 17]] || | [[:en:October 18|Oct 18]] || | [[:en:October 19|Oct 19]] || | [[:en:October 20|Oct 20]] || | [[:en:October 21|Oct 21]] || | [[:en:October 22|Oct 22]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:October 23|Oct 23]]
|-
 || | [[Libra 15|15]] || | [[Libra 16|16]] || | [[Libra 17|17]] || | [[Libra 18|18]] || | [[Libra 19|19]] || | [[Libra 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Libra 21|21]] || | [[Libra 22|22]] || | [[Libra 23|23]] || | [[Libra 24|24]] || | [[Libra 25|25]] || | [[Libra 26|26]] || | [[Libra 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Libra 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:October 24|Oct 24]] || | [[:en:October 25|Oct 25]] || | [[:en:October 26|Oct 26]] || | [[:en:October 27|Oct 27]] || | [[:en:October 28|Oct 28]] || | [[:en:October 29|Oct 29]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:October 30|Oct 30]] || | [[:en:October 31|Oct 31]] || | [[:en:November 1|Nov 1]] || | [[:en:November 2|Nov 2]] || | [[:en:November 3|Nov 3]] || | [[:en:November 4|Nov 4]] || | [[:en:November 5|Nov 5]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:November 6|Nov 6]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Scorpio]] || | [[Scorpio 1|1]] || | [[Scorpio 2|2]] || | [[Scorpio 3|3]] || | [[Scorpio 4|4]] || | [[Scorpio 5|5]] || | [[Scorpio 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Scorpio 7|7]] || | [[Scorpio 8|8]] || | [[Scorpio 9|9]] || | [[Scorpio 10|10]] || | [[Scorpio 11|11]] || | [[Scorpio 12|12]] || | [[Scorpio 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Scorpio 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:November 7|Nov 7]] || | [[:en:November 8|Nov 8]] || | [[:en:November 9|Nov 9]] || | [[:en:November 10|Nov 10]] || | [[:en:November 11|Nov 11]] || | [[:en:November 12|Nov 12]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:November 13|Nov 13]] || | [[:en:November 14|Nov 14]] || | [[:en:November 15|Nov 15]] || | [[:en:November 16|Nov 16]] || | [[:en:November 17|Nov 17]] || | [[:en:November 18|Nov 18]] || | [[:en:November 19|Nov 19]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:November 20|Nov 20]]
|-
 || | [[Scorpio 15|15]] || | [[Scorpio 16|16]] || | [[Scorpio 17|17]] || | [[Scorpio 18|18]] || | [[Scorpio 19|19]] || | [[Scorpio 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Scorpio 21|21]] || | [[Scorpio 22|22]] || | [[Scorpio 23|23]] || | [[Scorpio 24|24]] || | [[Scorpio 25|25]] || | [[Scorpio 26|26]] || | [[Scorpio 27|27]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Scorpio 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:November 21|Nov 21]] || | [[:en:November 22|Nov 22]] || | [[:en:November 23|Nov 23]] || | [[:en:November 24|Nov 24]] || | [[:en:November 25|Nov 25]] || | [[:en:November 26|Nov 26]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:November 27|Nov 27]] || | [[:en:November 28|Nov 28]] || | [[:en:November 29|Nov 29]] || | [[:en:November 30|Nov 30]] || | [[:en:December 1|Dec 1]] || | [[:en:December 2|Dec 2]] || | [[:en:December 3|Dec 3]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:December 4|Dec 4]]
|-
! rowspan="4" | [[Ophiuchus]] || | [[Ophiuchus 1|1]] || | [[Ophiuchus 2|2]] || | [[Ophiuchus 3|3]] || | [[Ophiuchus 4|4]] || | [[Ophiuchus 5|5]] || | [[Ophiuchus 6|6]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Ophiuchus 7|7]] || | [[Ophiuchus 8|8]] || | [[Ophiuchus 9|9]] || | [[Ophiuchus 10|10]] || | [[Ophiuchus 11|11]] || | [[Ophiuchus 12|12]] || | [[Ophiuchus 13|13]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Ophiuchus 14|14]]
|-
 || | [[:en:December 5|Dec 5]] || | [[:en:December 6|Dec 6]] || | [[:en:December 7|Dec 7]] || | [[:en:December 8|Dec 8]] || | [[:en:December 9|Dec 9]] || | [[:en:December 10|Dec 10]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:December 11|Dec 11]] || | [[:en:December 12|Dec 12]] || | [[:en:December 13|Dec 13]] || | [[:en:December 14|Dec 14]] || | [[:en:December 15|Dec 15]] || | [[:en:December 16|Dec 16]] || | [[:en:December 17|Dec 17]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:December 18|Dec 18]]
|-
 || | [[Ophiuchus 15|15]] || | [[Ophiuchus 16|16]] || | [[Ophiuchus 17|17]] || | [[Ophiuchus 18|18]] || | [[Ophiuchus 19|19]] || | [[Ophiuchus 20|20]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[Ophiuchus 21|21]] || | [[Ophiuchus 22|22]] || | [[Ophiuchus 23|23]] || | [[Ophiuchus 24|24]] || | [[Ophiuchus 25|25]] || | [[Ophiuchus 26|26]] || | [[Ophiuchus 27|27]] || style="background:#E6E6FA;" | [[Ophiuchus 28|28]]
|-
 || | [[:en:December 19|Dec 19]] || | [[:en:December 20|Dec 20]] || | [[:en:December 21|Dec 21]] || | [[:en:December 22|Dec 22]] || | [[:en:December 23|Dec 23]] || | [[:en:December 24|Dec 24]] || style="background:#ffd700;" | [[:en:December 25|Dec 25]] || | [[:en:December 26|Dec 26]] || | [[:en:December 27|Dec 27]] || | [[:en:December 28|Dec 28]] || | [[:en:December 29|Dec 29]] || | [[:en:December 30|Dec 30]] || | [[:en:December 31|Dec 31]] || style="background:#E6E6FA;" | [[:en:January 1|Jan 1]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[12021 GE]] (previous year)
* [[12023 GE]] (next year)
* [[Gaian calendar]]

[[Category:121st century]]
[[Category:12020s]]
[[Category:Gaian calendar years]]
[[Category:Gaian common years]]
[[Category:Common years beginning on Jan 3 (greg common)]]

{{DEFAULTSORT:12022}}

{{Gaian calendar}}
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
